name: Keep Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients
remarks: Synthea 'keep module' used with the -k command line flag.
After a patient is fully simulated, Synthea runs this module against the
finished record. The Guard state below only allows the module to reach the
Keep state when the patient was ever diagnosed with Rheumatoid arthritis.
This is detected via the persistent patient attribute 'had_ra', which the
rheumatoid_arthritis module sets immediately after the RA ConditionOnset.
Patients whose RA later entered remission are still kept, because the
downstream OMOP analyses define the cohort by condition occurrence rather
than by active status at the end of life.
